form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1609m after showing early pace at Cranbourne, at the bell was 2nd-2.4 beaten 7 m by Lazenby (1:58.60) in NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $4.40. The run previous 5th (Fr7) over 1720m at Melton, at the bell was 2nd-1.37 beaten 8 m by Woodlea Diego (2:05.90) in NR up to 45 on March 6 at $2.10. Take beating from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 1800m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was 4th-6.6 beaten 15 m by Trigger (2:13.10) in NR 40 to 43 on April 4 at $12.30. Before that, 9th (Sr2) over 1800m at this track beaten 18 m by Golden Jaylet (2:12.90) in NR up to 43 on March 28 at $23. Draws well so may do better.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Neds Beach at this track over 1800m in a NR 42 to 47 on April 11 at $18. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 3rd (Sr2) over 1800m at this track was 3rd-5.2 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Trigger (2:13.10) in NR 40 to 43 on April 4 at $20.20. Expected to go well.

Could play a role.
